## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes (lint, typecheck, build) — wait for the green check
- [ ] Code follows the existing style (Prettier + ESLint clean)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before opening
- [ ] No new `console.log` / debug statements left in
- [ ] No `.env*` files, secrets, or large binaries committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] (Template PR) All `LayoutData` sections render: identity, experience, skills, platforms, projects, files, links, socials, education
- [ ] (Template PR) Tested on mobile (≤640px), tablet (768px), desktop (≥1280px)
